transcript:
yeah night shift gave um lorazepam point five around two am but i'm not sure if it hit e mar right cause the system was buffering pharmacy uh flagged it already once this month

uh mr castillo thanks for seeing me i'm dr hayes from psychiatry how has the week been overall

fine fine

how's sleep been

they don't let me sleep people walking i told maria i don't want the pills after dinner but they make me take them anyway

which medications are you thinking of

the little white one the round one and there's another one i get mixed up my daughter says i'm not confused but she doesn't live here

any thoughts of wanting to hurt yourself any thoughts of hurting anyone else

no i wouldn't do that i i don't think so

are you hearing voices when nobody is there seeing things that aren't there

sometimes i hear the tv when it's off i don't know if that counts is that normal

he's been more restless after supper for like three nights pacing the hall he tried to go to the east wing twice couldn't find his room verbally aggressive with a cna when we redirected um no hitting we used crisis protocol once two staff calm voice snack de escalated no injuries no code

that's not what happened i was looking for the bathroom

roberto do you know where you are today and what day it is

i know i'm in a hospital it's tuesday or wednesday one of those

any chest pain new weakness fever

no

vitals this morning bp 142 over 88 heart rate 88 no new labs he did yell at his roommate once rooms got changed after that no falls since last note

day to day how much anxiety or low mood

i worry about my money i think somebody's moving my things i hid my glasses in a shoe so they can't find them

if we spend a few minutes on coping what usually helps when the evening gets loud

music sometimes but the hallway is still loud i try to stay in the chair

okay we're going to keep close monitoring given the evening pattern i'll leave a note for pharmacy on prn timing and review whether the med after dinner could be paradoxical agitation versus helping i'll have social work follow up on the belongings thing if pacing worsens or aggression comes back nursing uses crisis steps and pages follow up about a week anything else you want addressed today

my daughter says i need to be more cooperative i am cooperative

thank you nursing any questions

no we're good we'll watch evenings close
